---
title: "Interactive Dashboard"
---

## Explore & Filter Papers

Use the interactive dashboard below to filter papers by category, study design, keywords, and date range.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Dashboard Features

- Filter by clinical category and study design
- Search by keywords in titles and abstracts
- View publication trends and category analytics
- Download filtered results as CSV or BibTeX
:::

---

<iframe src="https://dahham-alsoud.shinyapps.io/ibd-litmonitor-dashboard/" class="shiny-app-frame" width="100%" height="900px"></iframe>

---

::: {.callout-note}
## Can't see the dashboard?

The dashboard is hosted on shinyapps.io. If it's not loading:

- Browse the [latest report](index.html) — all papers are available there with collapsible categories
- View the [archive](archive.html) of past reports
- Download the [JSON data](data/papers.json) for your own analysis
:::
